title: Tesla Stock Trends Following Q2 Earnings Reports
description: Recent financial reports highlight Tesla's earnings miss and revenue surge, driving search interest in the stock.

sources.title: Tesla misses on earnings, as free cash flow turns negative and margins slide
Tesla reports Q2 earnings miss but beats on revenue; cash burn rate less than expected
Tesla's Second-Quarter Revenue Surged Amid $5.8 Billion Spend in AI, Robotics -- 2nd Update

sections.heading: Earnings and Revenue Performance
paragraphs: According to CNBC, Tesla missed on earnings as free cash flow turned negative and margins slid.
Yahoo Finance reported that Tesla reported a Q2 earnings miss but beat on revenue, adding that the cash burn rate was less than expected.
Futu stated that Tesla's second-quarter revenue surged amid a $5.8 billion spend in AI and robotics.

sections.heading: Search Interest Details
paragraphs: The search term "tesla stock" has a reported search lower bound of 1,000 in the DK region.
This data is based on a trend feed published on Wednesday, July 22, 2026.

sections.heading: Background on Trending Data
paragraphs: Google Trends data reflects the popularity of search terms over a specific period and location.
The snapshot for this data was taken on July 22, 2026.

faq.q: What did CNBC report regarding Tesla's financial results?
faq.a: According to CNBC, Tesla missed on earnings, free cash flow turned negative, and margins slid.

faq.q: Did Tesla meet revenue expectations according to Yahoo Finance?
faq.a: Yahoo Finance reported that Tesla beat on revenue, despite a Q2 earnings miss.

faq.q: What area saw significant spending according to Futu?
faq.a: According to Futu, Tesla's second-quarter revenue surged amid a $5.8 billion spend in AI and robotics.
